title: polygala atacorensis
intro: Polygala atacorensis, also known as Ataco polygala, is a plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala atacorensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
